item: Execute BEAD-CAT-A015-4C01-04: Run pilot archive cycle + documentation (Scribe role) — execute cat_archive_evidence.py --run on evidence >90 days, write docs/evidence_archival_guide.md user guide, produce A015_final_report.json, run validation chain (cat_check_repo + cat_validate + pytest)
